step_1.sub_title: Tīmatahia mā te hono i tō toa Shopify. Ka hono māmā te TrustShop ki tō toa, hei whakamāmā i te whakahaere arotake me te whakarite hono ki ngā kiritaki.
step_1.title: ✋ Haere mai ki TrustShop
step_1.select_language: He aha te reo matua mō tō kōrero?
step_1.select_language_subtitle: Tīpakohia tō reo pai mō te atanga.
step_1.help_text: Ka taea e koe te huri i te reo matua i ngā wa katoa i ngā tautuhinga.

quick_guide.step_2: Ka tuwhera he whārangi, ā, ka hono aunoa te taupānga
quick_guide.step_3: Pāwhiria te pātea Save (i te kokonga rōpū-matau) ā, me kite koe i te karere angitū
quick_guide.step_4: Hoki mai ki tēnei whārangi tiimata hei haere tonu ki te tiimata i te TrustShop.
quick_guide.success_btn: I te angitū te hono i te taupānga
quick_guide.sub_title: Hono i te taupānga māmā i ngā hipanga e whai ake nei:
quick_guide.title: 👉 Arohia tēnei aratohu 👈
quick_guide.not_detect_embedded: Kāore e taea te kite i te taupānga. Tēnā whakaarahia anō.
quick_guide.add_widget_helptext: Kei te raru koe i te tāpiri i te wāhitau? Tēnā whakapā mai ki a mātou mō ngā tautoko taipitopito!
quick_guide.helptext:
Ko tēnei peka e tāpiri ana i ngā waehere e hiahiatia ana hei whakaatu arotake i tō toa.

Aroha mai, kāore e pā ki te hoahoa ratau te rārangi o tō toa.

step_2.sub_title: Whakaatu arotake i ngā hipanga e whai ake nei.
step_2.title: Tono Arotake Aunoa
step_2.email_setting_subtitle: Ka tukuna ngā īmēra tono arotake aunoa i runga i ngā tautuhinga kei raro nei
step_2.after_order: I muri i te pātea wāhitau
step_2.help_text: Ka taea e koe te huri i tēnei tautuhinga i ngā wa katoa i ngā tautuhinga.

quick_guide.title: Tāpiri Widget Arotake
quick_guide.recheck_btn: Hē. Pāwhiritia ki te whiwhi anō
quick_guide.step_2: Tāpiri te waehere kei raro i te kōnae ariā
quick_guide.step_4: Hoki ki tēnei whārangi rongoā hei whainga i te mahi rongoā.
quick_guide.helptext:
Ko tēnei peka e tāpiri ana i ngā waehere e hiahiatia ana hei whakaatu arotake i tō toa.

Aroha mai, kāore e pā ki te hoahoa ratau te rārangi o tō toa.

quick_guide.title: Tāpiri Widget Arotake
quick_guide.recheck_btn: Hē. Pāwhiritia ki te whiwhi anō
quick_guide.step_2: Ko te widget ka tāpiri ki tō tauira hua
quick_guide.step_4: Tirohia tō whārangi hua hei kite i ngā arotake i runga i te mahi
quick_guide.step_5: Hoki ki tēnei whārangi rongoā hei whainga i te mahi rongoā
quick_guide.helptext:
Ko tēnei peka e tāpiri ana i ngā waehere e hiahiatia ana hei whakaatu arotake i tō toa.

Aroha mai, kāore e pā ki te hoahoa ratau te rārangi o tō toa.

quick_guide.sub_title: Tēnā haere i ēnei paerewa hei whakatūpato arotake i tō toa:
quick_guide.title: Rarangi Paerewa
quick_guide.not_detect_widget: Aroha mai, kāore mātou i te kite i te widget. Me mēnā, whakamātauria anō!
quick_guide.add_widget_helptext: Kei te raru koe i te tāpiri i te widget? Hono mai ki mātou mō ngā rongoā whai take!

step_3.sub_title: Whakaatuhia te widget arotake i tō toa ipurangi.
step_3.title: Tūhono te whakaaturanga arotake hua
step_3.enable_app_embed_subtitle: Tēnā haere i ēnei paerewa hei whakatūpato arotake i tō toa

step_4.sub_title: Nāu te mahi! Kua tae koe ki te tautoko ki te tipu o tō tohu me ngā arotake me ngā tohutoro. Ko te wā kei te tūturu tō pakihi!
step_4.title: Kua tae koe ki te wā!
step_4.import_text: Tāpiri arotake māmā mai i ngā Arotake Hua e Shopify, Judge.me, Loox, me ētahi atu
step_4.dashboard_text: Tīmata ki te whakahaere arotake me te hoko kiritaki ki tō tohu

pricing_page.title: Uara māmā, māmā hoki!
pricing_page.sub_title: 7 rā whakamātautau kore utu. Kāore he utu huna.
pricing_page.free_plan_des: Rangahaua noa ki te tīmata, pai mō ngā tīmatanga.

basic.title: Paerewa
basic.sub_title: He pai mō ngā pakihi iti.

benefit.2: Ka taea te whakamahi i ngā āhuatanga paerewa

pro.title: Pakihi
pro.sub_title: Tīmata ki tō pakihi ki te rahi ake.

benefit.2: Ka taea te whakamahi i ngā āhuatanga premium.

unlimited.title: Katoa
unlimited.sub_title: Aroha mai, kāore e paingia tō pākiki.

benefit.2: Ka taea te whakamahi i ngā āhuatanga premium.

free.sub_title: Tīmatahia kore utu, pai mō ngā tīmatanga.

benefit.4: Āwhina i te whakauru i ngā whakaahua a ngā arotake

basic.sub_title: Pai mō ngā pakihi iti me ngā tangata whaihua.
